summary: Initialized Orchestrator project and session files, refactored the Rust CLI into safer testable units, added regression coverage for matching and playlist input parsing, and rewrote the README to match the real product. No commits were made during the session; the repo is improved substantially but still needs a live Spotify playlist run and a final review of working-tree changes before commit and push.
next_steps: Run MIX_SORTER against a real Spotify playlist, fix any runtime issues exposed by the live execution, and then review local_db.json plus the working-tree changes for a commit-ready push.
